calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-25-2015 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Thursday, June 25, 2015 in Department 525:
Attorney Neil Rosenbaum, Plaintiff/Respondent appears as Propria Persona.
No appearance by Defendant/Appellant Mary Gonzalez.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. Mr. Rosenbaum is sworn.

Plaintiff/Respondent, Neil Rosenbaum testifies on his own behalf and responds to questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced: not marked - letter regarding attorney fees,

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. Newly evidence retained by the Court.

Judge Pro Tem Micelle Brant; Clerk J. Kong; matter not reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar May-04-2015 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
